required_checks.description: Run git status before work and review dirty or untracked files.
Confirm all proposed changed files are inside approved paths.
Confirm blocked paths are not changed.
Parse every created or changed JSON file.
Confirm no secrets, credentials, tokens, or private keys are included.
Confirm broker actions, OANDA actions, live trading, and real order paths remain blocked.
Confirm commit package lists exact files only.
Run final git status and report exact changed files.

next_action: Run validators before any commit package is considered.
